initial_program:
% Dimensions
n_rows(Nr) :- Nr = #count{ R : input(R, _, _) }.
n_cols(Nc) :- Nc = #count{ C : input(_, C, _) }.

% Output grid size
size(K) :- K = #count{ C2 : input(0, C2, V2), V2 != 0 } * Nc.

% Output row and column ranges
output_row(0..K-1) :- size(K).
output_col(0..K-1) :- size(K).

% Output cell definition
output_cell(R,C) :- output_row(R), output_col(C).

% Offset for each nonzero input cell
offset(I,O) :- input(0,I,V), V != 0, O = #count{ C2 : input(0, C2, V2), V2 != 0, C2 > I } * Nc.

% Diagonal cells for each nonzero (t = 0..4)
diag(O + I,      Nc-1,   V) :- offset(I,O), input(0,I,V), V != 0.
diag(O + I + 1, Nc-2,   V) :- offset(I,O), input(0,I,V), V != 0.
diag(O + I + 2, Nc-3,   V) :- offset(I,O), input(0,I,V), V != 0.
diag(O + I + 3, Nc-4,   V) :- offset(I,O), input(0,I,V), V != 0.
diag(O + I + 4, Nc-5,   V) :- offset(I,O), input(0,I,V), V != 0.

% is_diag predicate
is_diag(R,C) :- diag(R,C,V).

% Cells that must be zero (nondiagonal)
must_be_zero(R,C) :- not is_diag(R,C).

% Constraints for diagonal cells (only the correct value allowed)
:- output(R,C,Color), diag(R,C,V), V != 0, Color != V.

% Constraints for nondiagonal cells (must be zero)
:- output(R,C,Color), Color != 0, must_be_zero(R,C).

% Each output cell gets exactly one colour
1 { output(R,C,Color) : color(Color) } 1 :- output_cell(R,C).

#show output/3.

<block>:16:91-92: error: syntax error, unexpected *, expecting "," or . or ;

% Dimensions
n_rows(Nr) :- Nr = #count{ R : input(R, _, _) }.
n_cols(Nc) :- Nc = #count{ C : input(_, C, _) }.

% Output grid size
cnt(Kc) :- #count{ C2 : input(0, C2, V2), V2 != 0 }.
size(K) :- K = Kc * Nc.


% Output row and column ranges
output_row(0..K-1) :- size(K).
output_col(0..K-1) :- size(K).

% Output cell definition
output_cell(R,C) :- output_row(R), output_col(C).

% Offset for each nonzero input cell
offset(I,O) :- input(0,I,V), V != 0, O = #count{ C2 : input(0, C2, V2), V2 != 0, C2 > I } * Nc.

% Diagonal cells for each nonzero (t = 0..4)
diag(O + I,      Nc-1,   V) :- offset(I,O), input(0,I,V), V != 0.
diag(O + I + 1, Nc-2,   V) :- offset(I,O), input(0,I,V), V != 0.
diag(O + I + 2, Nc-3,   V) :- offset(I,O), input(0,I,V), V != 0.
diag(O + I + 3, Nc-4,   V) :- offset(I,O), input(0,I,V), V != 0.
diag(O + I + 4, Nc-5,   V) :- offset(I,O), input(0,I,V), V != 0.

% is_diag predicate
is_diag(R,C) :- diag(R,C,V).

% Cells that must be zero (nondiagonal)
must_be_zero(R,C) :- not is_diag(R,C).

% Constraints for diagonal cells (only the correct value allowed)
:- output(R,C,Color), diag(R,C,V), V != 0, Color != V.

% Constraints for nondiagonal cells (must be zero)
:- output(R,C,Color), Color != 0, must_be_zero(R,C).

% Each output cell gets exactly one colour
1 { output(R,C,Color) : color(Color) } 1 :- output_cell(R,C).

final_program:
% Dimensions
n_rows(Nr) :- Nr = #count{ R : input(R, _, _) }.
n_cols(Nc) :- Nc = #count{ C : input(_, C, _) }.

% Output grid size
cnt(Kc) :- #count{ C2 : input(0, C2, V2), V2 != 0 }.
size(K) :- K = Kc * Nc.


% Output row and column ranges
output_row(0..K-1) :- size(K).
output_col(0..K-1) :- size(K).

% Output cell definition
output_cell(R,C) :- output_row(R), output_col(C).

% Offset for each nonzero input cell
offset(I,O) :- input(0,I,V), V != 0, O = #count{ C2 : input(0, C2, V2), V2 != 0, C2 > I } * Nc.

% Diagonal cells for each nonzero (t = 0..4)
diag(O + I,      Nc-1,   V) :- offset(I,O), input(0,I,V), V != 0.
diag(O + I + 1, Nc-2,   V) :- offset(I,O), input(0,I,V), V != 0.
diag(O + I + 2, Nc-3,   V) :- offset(I,O), input(0,I,V), V != 0.
diag(O + I + 3, Nc-4,   V) :- offset(I,O), input(0,I,V), V != 0.
diag(O + I + 4, Nc-5,   V) :- offset(I,O), input(0,I,V), V != 0.

% is_diag predicate
is_diag(R,C) :- diag(R,C,V).

% Cells that must be zero (nondiagonal)
must_be_zero(R,C) :- not is_diag(R,C).

% Constraints for diagonal cells (only the correct value allowed)
:- output(R,C,Color), diag(R,C,V), V != 0, Color != V.

% Constraints for nondiagonal cells (must be zero)
:- output(R,C,Color), Color != 0, must_be_zero(R,C).

% Each output cell gets exactly one colour
1 { output(R,C,Color) : color(Color) } 1 :- output_cell(R,C).
